title: Portal Guns Datapack
description: Adds a working portal gun to vanilla minecraft, complete with a balanced recipe and multiplayer support
body:
# Portal Guns Datapack

Bring the infamous portal gun from the game Portal into vanilla Minecraft!

This datapack adds a fully functional Portal Gun, complete with precise teleportation, proper rotation handling, and interdimensional portal support.

**Make sure to also download the required resourcepack**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/bjQalpYsyeY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


## Portal Gun
- Clean, Minecraft-style portal visuals
- Emissive portal textures and GUI sprites
- 6 craftable color variations
- Portals work across dimensions
- Each portal gun item is unique and has its own set of portals

## Accurate Portal Physics
- Custom hitbox-based portal detection
- Correct relative rotation when passing through
- Improved high-speed fall handling to prevent accidental deaths
- Optional experimental vertical momentum system

Enable with:
/function portal_guns:config/vertical_portal_motion

## Long Fall Boots
- Prevent fall damage
- Custom armor texture
- Craftable in survival

## Recipes
![Portal Gun Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0fa3ca563e7e7bb25679a192478fce53a0f0d22.png)

![Long Fall Boots Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e6930d670b2319501eb0ef907dc18596e2b37e9.png)
